prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic redesign for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest logo, the EXACT headline typography style described below, red subtitle banner styling, lighting mood, and overall Vice City neon-noir feel.

VERTICAL LAYOUT — IMPORTANT: there is NO QR code in this poster, so the Muha logo + headline + subtitle block should be VERTICALLY CENTERED on the poster (not stuck in the upper third like the reference). Shift the entire text-and-logo block DOWN compared to the reference so the Muha crest sits near the top-third mark, the headline lands roughly at vertical center, and the subtitle banner sits just below vertical center. The lower portion still shows the VIP nightclub background. Result: balanced composition with the foreground subject (text + logo) and background sharing the frame more evenly.

NO QR CODE: do NOT include any QR code anywhere. Do NOT include any 'SCAN FOR APP' callout.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F) with warm orange-red accents, deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple.

HEADER TYPOGRAPHY — CRITICAL FIDELITY:
  • Bold blocky sans-serif letterforms with thick uniform strokes (heavy GTA-style display face, NOT chrome, NOT silver, NOT glossy).
  • Letter FACE: warm cream / pale peach color with a subtle reddish-orange tint, rendered with a faint stone / concrete / weathered-marble TEXTURE — slightly grainy and organic, like sunbaked sandstone or warm aged plaster.
  • Letter OUTLINE: thin dark maroon / dried-blood red outline around each letter edge.
  • GLOW: a strong warm red-orange GLOW HALO radiating outward from behind and beneath every letter — like the letters are backlit by red neon, glow softly bleeding into the surrounding dark background, warm light cast on the letters' undersides.
  • DEPTH: 3D extruded shadow underneath each letter in deep maroon.
  • POSTURE: slight forward italic skew (~5-8°).
  • All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, two stacked lines: line 1 'GET IN', line 2 'THE LIST'. The phrase is 'GET IN THE LIST' — NOT 'GET ON THE LIST'.

SUBTITLE: same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading 'BECOME A MEMBER TODAY'. Red bar background, white-stroked text.

MUHA LOGO: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, exact match to reference, positioned above the headline as part of the vertically-centered text block.

BACKGROUND — ALL-RED VIP NIGHTCLUB: GTA Vice City nightclub entrance at night. Velvet-rope barrier with two glowing brass stanchions and a deep crimson rope; a chic doorway with a RED-NEON palm-tree silhouette sign above it; words 'VICE CITY' subtly glowing in RED neon on the club facade (small); wet rain-slicked black asphalt and curb reflecting RED neon only; palm fronds backlit in red; distant Miami skyline with red-orange ambient glow; out-of-focus silhouettes of stylish nightclub-goers in the distance. Opulent VIP entrance. NO Dodge Challenger, NO stacks of cash.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on headline, subtitle, and Muha logo; background atmospheric with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic editorial movie poster. No additional text.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Final/Get on the List.png
